executives.name: Aaron Keay
executives.background: Mr. Keay is an experienced entrepreneur and capital markets professional. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

executives.name: Elaine Ellingham
executives.background: Ms. Ellingham is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held senior positions with the Toronto Stock Exchange.

board_of_directors.name: Aaron Keay
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Keay is an experienced entrepreneur and capital markets professional. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Elaine Ellingham
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Ellingham is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held senior positions with the Toronto Stock Exchange.

board_of_directors.name: Renaud Adams
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Adams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining IAMGOLD, he was President and CEO of New Gold Inc. and previously served as President and CEO of Richmont Mines Inc. until its sale to Alamos Gold in 2017.
